content.body:
Implements tag co-occurrence graph with weighted degree centrality.
Docs sharing rare tags get higher edge weights (w = 1/tag_count).
Skips computation below MinDocsForLandmarks=100 threshold.
Writes tag-graph.json to .leo/cache/ for incremental future updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(gardener): add ComputeLandmarks and WriteTagGraph
